_notes: ROM-extracted encounter table. 128 encounters × 5 monster slots. All 5 slots contain monster IDs; exact game mechanic for which slots are active is not yet decoded (see TODO). Encounters 0-5 appear to be scripted boss fights. HIGH confidence for IDs; MEDIUM for structure interpretation.
_source: ROM 0x1A868 (5 bytes × 128 entries); addresses confirmed from RANDO source.
